verdict.answer_first: A states the plan immediately with “Recommended defaults… Library: react-i18next… next-intl if you're on Next.js,” while B opens with an irrelevant repo note.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to defaults: “react-i18next for a Vite/CRA SPA, next-intl if you're on Next.js App Router”; B also recommends but spends more time qualifying.
verdict.fabrication: B invents context: “the app isn't in this directory — /Users/elon/work/fable-profile is the ‘fablever’ Claude Code project.”
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it highlights the critical path: “Automate extraction,” “Pseudo-localization,” and “One namespace, end-to-end first.”
